77622797.title: Countdown (American TV series)
77622797.extract: Countdown is an American crime drama television series created and written by Derek Haas. It stars Jensen Ackles, Jessica Camacho, Violett Beane, Elliot Knight, Uli Latukefu and Eric Dane. It was released on Amazon Prime Video on June 25, 2025. In October 2025, the series was canceled after one season.
